headline: Apple Gaining Market Share In PCs, Smartphones
summary: Apple is gaining market share in PCs and smartphones, thanks to its MacBook Neo notebook and iPhone 17 handsets. Apple stock rose on Friday.

headline: Is It Worth Investing in Dell Technologies (DELL) Based on Wall Street's Bullish Views?
summary: The average brokerage recommendation (ABR) for Dell Technologies (DELL) is equivalent to a Buy. The overly optimistic recommendations of Wall Street analysts make the effectiveness of this highly sought-after metric questionable. So, is it worth buying the stock?

headline: China AI Firm Discloses $92 Million of Banned Nvidia Chip Servers to Beijing
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Hours after the United States charged a Super Micro Computer Inc. co-founder with illegally smuggling billions of dollars’ worth of Nvidia Corp. AI chips to China, shares of a little-known Shenzhen-based computing company plummeted by the daily limit of 20%.Sharetronic Data Technology Co., which is setting up AI data centers across the Asian country, said immediately after the plunge that it complies with regulations for hardware purchases.
